title: Totem Rebalance
description: Totems can only be obtained from evokers in mansions and ominious vaults.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3f2277515f4fc4a23f773c9f12a78acbe659b39.webp)
This datapack or mod removes the totem of undying from raids - only evokers in woodland mansions drop them. Additionally, totems can be obtained from ominous vaults with the same probability as heavy cores.
